title: Black Pearl
description: Black Pearl has returned to calm stormy seas with chamomile blue and lavender oil. Spritz on this limited edition perfume, inhaling warming myrrh and exhaling your woes.
ingredients: Matricaria Recutita Flower Oil (Chamomile Blue Oil)

images.alt: A clear glass square bottle of Black Pearl Perfume with a black spray top, centered on a light grey background. The label is black with white, handwritten-style text and a small green "LUSH CLUB" sticker in the top left corner.

A clear glass bottle of Black Pearl Perfume stands on a reflective surface against a lavender gradient background. It is flanked by a dried sprig of lavender, a white chamomile flower, and dried yellow petals.
Six Lush Club fragrances (Body Spray in Snowcake, VIMT-NO, 25:43; Perfume in Big Blue, Candy Rain, Black Pearl) are shown floating diagonally against a vibrant green and yellow background.
